The winner then races against the track itself in an attempt to win the cash prize

programme.title: Lightning
programme.desc: Comedian Zoe Lyons hosts the quick-fire quiz in which six contestants compete across six rounds testing their general knowledge, quick thinking and speedy reactions

programme.title: The Farmers' Country Showdown
programme.desc: Alpaca farmers Debbie and Paul, along with fellow alpaca farmer Bev, hope to impress the judges as they compete at the Westmorland County Show in Cumbria

programme.title: The Hidden World of Hospitality with Tom Kerridge
programme.desc: The chef looks at how the industry delivers exceptional service on a huge scale. In Wolverhampton, Tom meets the team behind Grand Station, a large events venue housed in a former railway station. And the presenter has a huge catering event of his own - the Six Nations rugby match between England and France at Twickenham

programme.title: Wild Brazil
programme.desc: A fierce drought culminates in huge and ferocious fires, and the capuchin monkeys, giant otters and coatis must use their survival skills to endure the extreme conditions. The animals are also looking for mates so they can breed in time to ensure the next generation are born at the optimal moment

programme.title: Flog It!
programme.desc: Thomas Plant and David Fletcher are at Norwich Cathedral to select items to take to auction, including a Masonic watch and a sought after commemorative mug by Eric Ravilious. Plus, presenter Paul Martin visits the former home of Robert Walpole Britain's first prime minister

programme.title: Richard Osman's House of Games
programme.desc: Former players Fern Britton, JB Gill, John Kearns and Sally Lindsay compete on double points Friday before the winner takes home the trophy

programme.title: Just One Thing
programme.desc: Roman Kemp suggests a 'reverse-moves' approach to exercise, including walking downhill instead of up and lowering weights instead of lifting them, both of which could have significant health benefits

programme.title: Grand Tours of Scotland's Lochs
programme.desc: Landing at Glenuig, Paul Murton makes his way inland to Loch Moidart and MacDonald country, walking the old coffin road, which was used for centuries by funeral parties, taking their dead to a sacred isle. On the track Paul meets a trials bike enthusiast and learns the secrets of a 'dabbing coat' before landing off the Green Isle, where he rings a 1,100-year-old bell for the dead. Taking a boat north, Paul sails up Loch Shiel to Glenfinnan where Bonnie Prince Charlie officially began his rising to reclaim the throne for the Stuart Dynasty. From a forgotten monument that commemorates this event, Paul heads back to the coast and Loch Ailort, where he learns how to knife fight before taking a trip across the loch to a deserted community on the roadless Ardnish peninsula

programme.title: Beechgrove Garden
programme.desc: Brian Cunningham and Kirsty Wilson work on the garden's borders, replanting, filling gaps and replacing losses all around the plot. Kirsty will also be planting in the border behind Beechgrove's main pond, where other gaps have appeared, and she is building a new structure to create a habitat for pollinators

programme.title: Gardeners' World
programme.desc: Arit Anderson, Jamie Butterworth and Frances Tophill explore the first RHS Sandringham Flower Show, showcasing stunning gardens, floral displays and expert horticultural advice. Highlights include rose-growing tips, drought-tolerant achilleas, succulent care from enthusiastic collectors, and a Hampshire plantsman sharing his family's enduring nursery tradition and passion for gardening

programme.title: Bergerac
programme.desc: Modern re-imagining of the iconic Jersey-set crime drama, starring Damien Molony as troubled detective Jim Bergerac. When a member of one of the region's wealthiest families is murdered, the police want their best detective on the case. Meanwhile, a man from Bergerac's past makes a shocking accusation. With Zoe Wanamaker and Philip Glenister

programme.title: Bergerac
programme.desc: The police are desperate to find a kidnapped baby before it is too late. Bergerac questions a convicted kidnapper, and the battle lines are drawn between these two old foes. Meanwhile, the detective also disappoints his daughter Kim again and incurs the wrath of his mother-in-law

programme.title: Newsnight
programme.desc: Analysis of the day's events with Matt Chorley

programme.title: Janet Planet
programme.desc: An 11-year-old girl drifts into a fantasy world as three visitors take an interest in her mother over the summer of 1991. But her vivid imagination begins to influence her real life. Coming-of-age drama, starring Zoe Ziegler, Julianne Nicholson, Will Patton and Sophie Okonedo

programme.title: There's a Gangster In My Flat - Panorama
programme.desc: Hazel Martin speaks to flat owners who paid reputable agencies to do tenancy checks but still ended up handing over their keys to criminals using fake IDs and references to take advantage of lax security in the rental market. Even when there appears to be clear evidence of criminal behaviour, gangs are escaping prosecution and landlords say it can take months to re-possess their properties

programme.title: Natalie Cassidy: Caring Together
programme.desc: Natalie's training switches to care for the elderly, bringing back memories of her beloved dad. In college, the students get hands-on with different aspects of support and try out glasses that simulate conditions like glaucoma, along with weighted suits that affect movement and balance. Natalie's placement takes her to a Royal British Legion care home, where the focus is on keeping the residents active and involved. The programme also meets a group of men who gather as part of the Men's Shed community programme in Newtownabbey

programme.title: Starmer: What Went Wrong
programme.desc: The story of how Sir Keir Starmer's premiership unravelled, from Labour's historic 2024 landslide to the fatal miscalculations and internal revolt that forced him from power

programme.title: Newsround
programme.desc: Current affairs reports aimed at a younger audience

programme.title: Gardeners' World
programme.desc: Arit Anderson, Jamie Butterworth and Frances Tophill explore the first RHS Sandringham Flower Show, showcasing stunning gardens, floral displays and expert horticultural advice. Highlights include rose-growing tips, drought-tolerant achilleas, succulent care from enthusiastic collectors, and a Hampshire plantsman sharing his family's enduring nursery tradition and passion for gardening

programme.title: This Wild Life
programme.desc: Wildlife expert Saba Douglas-Hamilton and the elephant rescue team race to save the life of a recently orphaned calf. The baby elephant is flown to an elephant orphanage in Nairobi, but with a terror threat on the Kenya's East coast, the family's safari camp is also in crisis. Saba must work to save the business and do all she can to protect Samburu's trusting elephants

programme.title: Funeral in Berlin
programme.desc: Former crook and disreputable spy Harry Palmer has to carefully engineer the defection of a Russian officer responsible for safeguarding vital military secrets - but the mission proves less than straightforward. Cold War thriller and the second film to feature Len Deighton's character, starring Michael Caine, Eva Renzi, Oscar Homolka, Paul Hubschmid and Guy Doleman

programme.title: The Great British Sewing Bee
programme.desc: Judges Patrick Grant and Esme Young put the sewers through their paces with another three challenges themed around colours and prints, including an adaptive shell top involving a couple of tricky pattern matches. Hosted by Sophie Willan

However, she is about to marry another man - and the situation becomes even more difficult when a cynical reporter enters the fray. Musical comedy based on The Philadelphia Story with a score by Cole Porter, starring Bing Crosby, Frank Sinatra and Grace Kelly, with Louis Armstrong appearing as himself

programme.title: Casablanca
programme.desc: The American expat owner of a Moroccan nightclub is reunited with his old flame during the Second World War. Now married to a Czech freedom fighter, she needs his help to get them safely out of the country before they are captured by the Nazis - but the former lovers also have to wrestle the temptation to rekindle their simmering romance. Drama, with Humphrey Bogart, Ingrid Bergman, Claude Rains and Paul Henreid

programme.title: Love Monster
programme.desc: Elder Panda is teaching Love Monster to fly a kite. Love Monster loves to watch it swish around in the air. Elder Panda goes off to get some froyo, which is perfect on Kite Day. Before he goes, he tells Love Monster that soon it will be time for him to go on to his next kiting challenge. Love Monster looks at all the other kites and sees the dragon kite, which is the largest kite of them all. Love Monster's small kite doesn't seem that exciting any more. He decides to try the dragon kite for just a minute. At first it seems easy, but then a wind gets it tangled in a tree. The rope breaks, and the kite flies off, causing mayhem in Fluffytown with everyone thinking it is a real dragon invasion. Finally, Elder Panda arrives and manages to bring it down to the ground using an umbrella, and Love Monster comes clean, saying how sorry he is. Elder Panda is disappointed but he does understand, as he too wanted to fly before he could run, but sometimes you have to start small before going big.

programme.title: Go Jetters
programme.desc: The Go Jetters are going to Westman Islands, Iceland, where the world's largest colony of Atlantic puffins gathers every year. Lars loves these tough little birds and explains how, although they spend most of their lives flying out to sea and fishing, they return to land each year to lay their eggs. When the baby birds, also called pufflings, eventually hatch, they fly out towards the ocean. But the light from nearby towns often confuses them about where to go, leading local children and adults to form 'puffin patrols' to rescue the pufflings. Lars is excited to help out but is upset when he discovers Glitch, also a fan of puffins, is already well-known on the islands for his skills as a puffin rescuer. Although Glitch offers him a place in his puffin patrol, Lars is determined to outdo Glitch with a patrol of his own - but when he recruits a clumsy Grimbot, things take a turn for the worse...

programme.title: Dog Squad
programme.desc: Dan the border collie is a search and rescue dog who works with his owner Jamie. His super nose follows scents and smells like clues so they can rescue people who need their help. Dan is busy digging a hole when his owner Jamie gets a very important phone call - police officer Penny needs them to go to Woofton Woods to look for a lost birdwatcher who is out trying to spot a rare bird, the Woofton woodpecker. After locating the birdwatcher's car, Dan has to find the scent to discover which of the many paths she has taken through the woods. But the scent takes them off the path and into the canopy of trees, which are full of low-hanging branches and logs. Jamie kits Dan up with his breeze-busting bell so that he can hear him in the thicker forest. But after tracking down the lost birdwatcher, Dan and Jamie head back to the car park only to discover her car is still there. The birdwatcher has gone missing again! Can Dan and Jamie complete a double rescue?

programme.title: Dog Squad
programme.desc: Newfoundland Sylvie is a big therapy dog with big soft cuddles who loves to help people when they're worried. She and her owner Katrina visit all sorts of people every day, young and old. Sylvie and her owner Katrina are helping a girl called Akilah, who is joining the local school after arriving from a foreign country. Lots of things will be very different for her, so Sylvie will need her super heart to make her feel as welcome as possible. After meeting Akilah and her mum, along with Fred the teaching assistant, Sylvie takes her to the school hall for some lunch, stopping to admire some artwork along the way. Then Sylvie acts as Akilah's furry tour guide on a whistlestop tour of the school, including a trip to the library, before guiding her to her new classroom to meet the teacher and all her new friends. There will be lots of new faces, and everyone will be talking in a language she's still learning - but with Sylvie and her super heart by her side, Akilah is sure to make lots of friends.

Tinks uses her super fetch skills to help Charli every day. The smallest of the Dog Squad gang, Tinks is a little Lhasa apso with lots of big dog energy. Charli is meeting her friend Annabel for lunch at the local café. They haven't been out for a lunch treat for ages, and the café's speciality is Tinks's favourite - chicken. First, Charli parks her car using her blue parking badge and then gets her wheelchair out of the boot using a hoist. Tinks then helps Charli go into the café, find a table and go to the counter to order their lunch. But when the café owner sees Tinks, he tells Charli that they only allow in guide dogs and that Tinks will have to wait outside. Brave Tinks summons all her big dog energy to help Charli persuade the owner to let them stay and enjoy their chicken sandwich.

programme.desc: Two mantis shrimp go aboard the Octopod and have a battle and the Octonauts must get them to stop fighting before the blows of their powerful claws strikes damage the vessel and make them crash into a coral reef. Animated adventures with the intrepid band of explorers roam the oceans

programme.title: Vida the Vet
programme.desc: When Zigzag hurts her foot on the job, Vida is there to help fix it. But Zigzag still has to deliver her packages in time for Vida's surprise Vet Day party

programme.title: Go Jetters
programme.desc: When Grim HQ's heating gets stuck on, Glitch looks for a cold place to land and cool down. Meanwhile, the Go Jetters enjoy the cool sights of Harbin Ice City in China. Every year sculptors at the festival create realistic models of world famous landmarks from blocks of ice and Lars is attempting to carve the Eiffel Tower

programme.title: Big Lizard
programme.desc: Cosima and Big Lizard's solar-powered hoverboards run out of battery at nightfall. Can glowbugs be the answer?

programme.title: Yukee
programme.desc: Yukee’s garden pals think the fortune cookie messages she has given them are going to come true! How can Yukee tell them they’re just for fun and not going to happen? Or are they?

programme.title: Froglets
programme.desc: Ziff, Pipp and Button don homemade skis and snowboards to whiz down a mountain of winter duvets

programme.title: Something Special
programme.desc: Ben meets Hussain and Hassan to find out about insects. They pretend to be bees and explore a bug hotel. Mr Tumble is in amongst the flowers trying to make friends with a bee

programme.title: Dog Squad
programme.desc: Tinks is a disability assistance dog for her owner Charli, who has a condition that makes it painful for her to pick things up or to push and pull things. Tinks uses her super fetch skills to help Charli every day. Charli is helping park ranger Pauline with some litter picking in Woofton Park. First they have to travel across the tricky terrain in the park to meet Pauline, so she can give them the instructions and equipment they need. Tinks persuades Charli to use the motor on Charli's wheelchair at turbo speed! Tinks helps Charli find the litter, but the gate to the recycling bins is locked, and the recycling van is on its way. Can Tinks fetch park ranger Pauline in time to recycle their rubbish?

programme.title: Football Fantastics
programme.desc: Match of the Day is coming to film the Fantastics, but an injured Jaz can't play. Instead, she asks Kassius to film her presenting a short film about the team, hoping to get it on TV.

programme.title: Zog
programme.desc: The fearsome Great Gnanna Gnome has a case of bottom-fungal-itis. Zog and the doctors must figure out how to treat the mushroom without incurring Gnanna's anger.

programme.title: Vegesaurs
programme.desc: Ginger and the Peas meet the stinky Onion-Rexes who help stop the nasty Bananaraptors

programme.title: Steve and Aneeshwar Go Wild
programme.desc: Steve and Aneeshwar meet the cassowaries, which are dinosaur-like birds, and learn how they're adapted to life in the jungle. Their next encounter is with the Sunda gharial, which is a type of crocodile. Steve and Aneeshwar see what great swimmers the reptiles are and how their long mouths help them to catch fish. They then discover what links the cassowary and Sunda gharial in the wild

programme.title: Roots and Fruits
programme.desc: Live from the Roots and Fruits theatre, it’s the spectacular music duo Okra playing the floor piano together in perfect sync.

programme.title: The Game Catchers
programme.desc: The friends land on the Perfume Planet and learn to play the train race. They're having a lot of fun but are interrupted after a lost spaceship lands in the middle of the game

programme.title: Puffin Rock
programme.desc: When Oona and Isabelle go to get a glimpse of a Cattle Egret, Baba discovers a whole new small world along the way

programme.title: Love Monster
programme.desc: The hairy hero is partnered with Bad Idea Puppy for the three-legged race

programme.title: Numberblocks
programme.desc: The Numberblocks have so many fun ideas, how can they choose what to do next? Build a pirate ship or a rocket? Play stampolines, or maybe have a picnic?

programme.title: Colourblocks
programme.desc: Brown takes the Colourblocks exploring in the forest. Learn different ways to mix brown with the Colourblocks.

programme.title: Froglets
programme.desc: Ziff, Pipp and Button get creative with empty toilet rolls and turn into Froggie robots

programme.title: Playtime Towers
programme.desc: Bella and Lift visit Patch in the Cloud Kitchen, but he has lost one of his boots - it was stolen by a cheeky crab. This gives him a great idea for a tasty treat - crabby croissant.

programme.title: Yukee
programme.desc: Yukee enjoys the peace and quiet in the garden when she wakes up early. But she soon discovers that while it might be quiet, the garden’s never silent.

programme.title: Tiny Tunes
programme.desc: Lisa and the children make tree rubbings and sign and sing Hush-a-Bye Baby

programme.title: Nick Cope's Popcast
programme.desc: Recycling gives Nick an idea for a Popcast Song about a rusty old robot

programme.title: Piripenguins
programme.desc: Brinicle invites his friends round to taste his brioche, but it is chewy and hasn't risen at all. Despite this, Brinicle announces he has entered a baking competition

programme.title: Zog
programme.desc: Gadabout's talent for gardening has disastrous consequences.

programme.title: James Martin's French Adventure
programme.desc: The chef arrives in the riverside town of L'Isle-sur-la-Sorgue in south-eastern France, where his culinary hero Keith Floyd once owned a restaurant. Buying produce from its floating market, and a Floyd-style hat, James sets up his mobile kitchen on a bridge overlooking the river, and cooks peaches pain perdu in the sunshine. Heading back in the direction of the town, James samples some truffle-laden dishes at renowned restaurant La Beaugraviere

programme.title: On Her Majesty's Secret Service
programme.desc: While on leave, James Bond prevents a young woman - Teresa 'Tracy' Draco - from taking her own life. Her father is Marc-Ange Draco, the head of a powerful crime syndicate who is impressed by Bond and wants him to protect his daughter by marrying her. In exchange, he offers Bond information that will lead him to master criminal and arch-enemy Ernst Stavro Blofeld, who is intent on destroying world peace by means of a lethal virus unless he receives an international amnesty for his crimes. Spy adventure, starring George Lazenby in his only outing as 007, alongside Telly Savalas, Diana Rigg, Gabriele Ferzetti and Bernard Lee

programme.title: ITV News
programme.desc: A round-up of the latest headlines

programme.title: Love Your Weekend with Alan Titchmarsh
programme.desc: Alan is joined at Manor Farm by actress Joanna Page, who discusses celebrating the nation's pets, while Countryfile presenter Matt Baker talks about life on the farm. Plus, carpenter Wayne Perrey has a step-by-step guide to making window boxes

programme.title: Fern Britton: Inside the Vet's
programme.desc: Fern meets a Jack Russell terrier whose enormous lump is proving to be a puzzle for the vets, while a 10-month-old cat is brought in with an injury sustained in a fight. Dr James Greenwood provides emergency care to a whippet with a nasty throat injury, and also delivers a masterclass on doggy dental hygiene with special help from his own pet Dolly

programme.title: ITV News and Weather
programme.desc: Round-up of the latest headlines

programme.title: Deal or No Deal: Celebrity Special
programme.desc: Stephen Mulhern hosts a special charity edition as The Last Leg co-host Alex Brooker goes up against the infamous Banker, supported on the wings by his Soccer Aid family. Can Alex choose the right boxes and resist the tempting cash offers until just the right moment to bag a huge cash prize for Unicef?

programme.title: Tipping Point: Lucky Stars
programme.desc: Ben Shephard hosts as John Barnes, Charlotte Church and Stephen Bailey answer questions to win turns on an arcade-style machine. Dropping tokens down a choice of four chutes, they hope to knock piles of them off a moving shelf - and the more they collect, the better their chances of collecting the £20,000 prize for their selected charity

programme.title: Diamonds Are Forever
programme.desc: James Bond investigates a diamond-smuggling operation, and discovers that behind the scheme is his insidious arch-enemy Blofeld, who is planning to construct a devastating orbital doomsday weapon powered by the precious stones, which will force world powers to disarm and give him global domination. Spy adventure, starring Sean Connery, Jill St John, Charles Gray, Bernard Lee and Lois Maxwell

programme.title: The Chase for Soccer Aid
programme.desc: David James, Sam Quek, Harry Aikines-Aryeetey and Maisie Adam work as a team in the hope of winning big money for UNICEF. Bradley Walsh presents, but it remains to be seen if the contestants can take down a Chaser

programme.title: ITV News and Weather
programme.desc: Round-up of the latest headlines

programme.title: FIFA World Cup 2026 Final
programme.desc: Spain v Argentina (Kick-off 8.00pm). Coverage of the final, which takes place at New York/New Jersey Stadium in the USA. Spain reached only their second World Cup final by defeating tournament favourites France with a masterclass in their semi-final, winning 2-0 and completely nullifying a disjointed French outfit with ease. They won on their only other appearance in the final, against the Netherlands in 2010, and start as favourites against the defending champions. Argentina are aiming to become only the third nation in history to win back-to-back world crowns, following on from Italy in the 1930s, and Brazil in 1958 and 1962, but will need to be at their very best against the Spaniards. The South Americans came from behind in the last 16 against Egypt and again against England in the semi-finals, with their fight and team spirit making up for weaknesses elsewhere

programme.title: The 1% Club

programme.title: The Vardys
programme.desc: Despite Jamie's best efforts on the pitch, his new Italian side are struggling to get a win and stay out of the relegation zone. Things go from bad to worse when the Vardys' lakeside villa is dramatically burgled, leaving the whole family on edge and considering whether to return home. On a whistle-stop trip back to the UK, Becky and Jamie stage an elaborate photoshoot but also find a quiet moment to make the big decision - whatever happens with the football, they will bring the kids home

programme.title: Deal or No Deal
programme.desc: Stephen Mulhern hosts as Carolyn tries to open the 22 red boxes in the right order, taking on the infamous Banker for the chance to win a life-changing cash prize

programme.title: Tipping Point
programme.desc: Ben Shephard hosts the quiz in which contestants answer questions to win turns on an arcade-style machine. Dropping tokens down a choice of four chutes, they hope to knock piles of them off a moving shelf - and the more they collect, the greater the prize fund. The player who has won the least amount is then eliminated, and the last one standing competes for a £10,000 jackpot

programme.title: The Chase
programme.desc: Bradley Walsh presents as Ben from Swindon, Kieran from Rawtenstall, Fi from Dorset and Roxy from Sheffield pit their wits against one of the ruthless Chasers in the hope of winning a potential prize pot worth thousands of pounds. They work as a team and play strategically to answer general knowledge questions against the clock and race down the game board to the exit without being caught

programme.title: ITV Evening News; Weather
programme.desc: A round-up of the day's news headlines and talking points from the UK and around the world

programme.title: Abbey Clancy: Celebrity Homes
programme.desc: Abbey Clancy heads to the home of beauty and fashion influencer Lorna Luxe, who reveals the challenges of furnishing her enormous super-modern subterranean home. She also visits author and businesswoman Jo Wood, who invites her into an off-grid Northamptonshire farmhouse that she's packed with personality

programme.title: Emmerdale
programme.desc: Cain is trapped, while Dawn is not happy about Billy dating Gabby and there are worries for Kev when an old face turns up

programme.title: Coronation Street
programme.desc: Maria struggles with the impact of Gary's involvement as Sarah finally confesses to killing Theo, while news of Harper and Sam's homecoming provides the Platts with respite

programme.title: The Twisted Tale of Amanda Knox
programme.desc: As Amanda, Raffaele, and Patrick Lumumba enter prison, Giuliano Mignini, their prosecutor, continues to build his case against them while the media's reporting turns Amanda into a monster

programme.title: The Twisted Tale of Amanda Knox
programme.desc: A wrench is thrown in Mignini's case and the search for a new suspect begins. As the highly anticipated trial unfolds, Amanda's choices continue to be scrutinised by the Press. Drama, starring Grace Van Patten

programme.title: ITV News; Weather
programme.desc: A fresh perspective on the major stories of the day, featuring national and international news, with reports and analysis from ITV's correspondents

programme.title: Inside the Langham: Britain's First Grand Hotel
programme.desc: Documentary following chefs, engineers and hoteliers at the central London hotel as they pull off glittering events, luxury renovations and culinary challenges while battling to ensure that the heritage destination stands out in a fierce-five star market. As Michel Roux hosts the biggest dinner of the year, chef Oliver must manage a culinary crisis, while Alice prepares a £10,000 a night suite for a demanding guest, and twin engineers Alan and Trevor take a leap of faith to light up the Langham. Maureen Lipman narrates

programme.title: Nobody's Fool
programme.desc: With fewer players left and the finale looming, alliances tighten and betrayals feel inevitable, while Harry reveals himself to be great at maths and this has not gone unnoticed. Whispered conversations, overheard plots and shifting loyalties dominate the house as players begin thinking not about survival, but about who they want to face in the final. A maths/shooting-led challenge rewards bold, decisive play from Billy and delivers a powerful advantage. Strategic reality quiz, hosted by Emily Atack and Danny Dyer

programme.title: Long Lost Family
programme.desc: Both stories in this episode celebrate the bond between brothers. In the first case, Lee Sharp's adoptive parents had told him that he was a foundling, but the team discovers this isn't true and a sibling he never knew he had. In the second case, Peter MacDonald's father snatched him from his mother's arms as a baby as a train carrying her and his older brother Trevor pulled out of Preston station. After 58 years of longing, Peter wants to see his brother again

programme.title: Unwind with ITV
programme.desc: Daily escape designed to calm the mind and encourage relaxation and reflection

programme.title: James Martin's American Adventure
programme.desc: The chef rides his motorbike through the coastal city of Santa Cruz, California. He shops at local farmers' markets before cooking his recipes on a family run artichoke farm. James also tries his hand at surfing, but gets upstaged by a dog

programme.title: Diamonds Are Forever
programme.desc: James Bond investigates a diamond-smuggling operation, and discovers that behind the scheme is his insidious arch-enemy Blofeld, who is planning to construct a devastating orbital doomsday weapon powered by the precious stones, which will force world powers to disarm and give him global domination. Spy adventure, starring Sean Connery, Jill St John, Charles Gray, Bernard Lee and Lois Maxwell

Period fantasy adventure, starring Emma Thompson, Colin Firth and Kelly Macdonald

programme.desc: In a fantasy world where a fairy godmother endows each newborn with a special attribute, baby Ella is given the unwelcome gift of obedience. While growing up, she is magically compelled to do anything she is told to, and her stepmother takes great delight in forcing the girl to obey her every whim. So Ella sets out on a quest to find her fairy godmother and get her to take back her unwanted birthright. Fantasy adventure, starring Anne Hathaway, Hugh Dancy, Cary Elwes, Minnie Driver and Joanna Lumley

programme.desc: The bungling leader of a band of inept buccaneers is determined to prove his worth to his rivals and win the coveted Pirate of the Year award. An encounter with the naturalist Charles Darwin gives him the chance to pull off a daring crime - if he can survive coming face to face with the pirate-hating Queen Victoria. Animated comedy, with the voices of Hugh Grant, Martin Freeman, Imelda Staunton and David Tennant

programme.title: George and Mildred
programme.desc: George is told to mind his table manners when Mildred invites her sister round for a meal. Brian Murphy and Yootha Joyce star

programme.title: Wycliffe
programme.desc: Kersey and Lane investigate the death of a fisherman, who was killed while at sea, and find EC quotas are taking their toll in more ways than one. They also discover a new sense of rivalry in their working relationship, but a bit of healthy competition could give them the edge they need to solve the case. Jack Shepherd stars, with Jimmy Yuill and Helen Masters

programme.title: Wycliffe
programme.desc: A psychiatrist's wife is murdered in a seemingly unprovoked attack, and establishing a motive proves harder than catching the killer. Meanwhile, Lane and Kersey disagree at every turn of the investigation. Jack Shepherd stars as the dour detective

programme.title: Doc Martin
programme.desc: Louisa worries Dr Timoney's suggestion that she and Martin aren't meant to be together might have prompted him to leave Portwenn for good. Calling on Ruth, Morwenna and Janice for help, she tries to track the down the missing GP, with no luck. However, what Dr Ellingham's friends and family fail to realise is that he is actually trapped up at the Winton farm, where desperate wife Annie is trying to coerce him into performing a life-saving operation on her terminally ill husband Jim. Meanwhile, Ruth and Bert seek out Al to offer him a proposition regarding the whisky and the B&B. Medical drama, starring Martin Clunes

programme.title: Lewis
programme.desc: The detective investigates after a botanist accidentally unearths the body of a recently buried professor who was fixated upon solving a seemingly impossible riddle by Lewis Carroll. The victim had a long-standing rivalry with his brother - giving Lewis and Hathaway an obvious suspect - but the case is hindered by the mind games of two students who seem intent on causing trouble in their quest to gain admittance to a mysterious club. Guest starring Celia Imrie and James Fleet, with Kevin Whately and Laurence Fox

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Marple
programme.desc: Millionaire's wife Mary Pritchard, a notoriously demanding invalid, apparently dies of shock in her locked room when the geranium in her wallpaper turns blue, fulfilling the dire warning of a mysterious fortune teller. The manner of her death creates a sensation in the tense village community of Little Ambrose, but although the woman's husband confesses to the crime, Miss Marple uncovers new evidence that could affect the court hearing's outcome and races to halt proceedings before the wrong person is convicted. Starring Julia McKenzie, with Toby Stephens, Sharon Small, Patrick Baladi, Caroline Catz, Claire Rushbrook and Donald Sinden

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: The Midsomer Worthy amateur choir is thrown into panic when baritone Connor Simpson is killed on the eve of the prestigious regional Four Choirs competition. A birdwatcher is also murdered shortly after, and DCI Barnaby and DC Jones uncover bitter rivalry and tense marital relationships as they try to establish if there is a connection between the two cases. Peter Capaldi guest stars

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: The residents of Elverton-cum-Latterly gather to hold a protest meeting about proposals for a supermarket in the centre of the village, but proceedings are brought to a halt by the discovery of the site adviser's body. Barnaby and Jones discover the victim had a penchant for acting out role-play scenarios with local women - but that is not the only secret the villagers are hiding. John Nettles and Jason Hughes star

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: A Midsomer Malham resident is accused of battering her best friend to death, but Barnaby cannot help feeling the evidence against her does not add up. The detective enlists the help of a pensioner, who also happens to be one of the key witnesses, to find out what really happened on the night of the murder - and realises the elderly lady's life could be at risk. With John Nettles, Jason Hughes and Thelma Barlow

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: Barnaby and Jones investigate the deaths of a female pensioner and a vicar who were both killed during Broughton village's annual contest between men and women. The pair soon discover the preacher had a secret that could provide a motive - but when another body is found, they realise the answer to all the deaths lies in the history books. John Nettles and Jason Hughes star

programme.title: Vera
programme.desc: The detective investigates the mysterious death of businessman John Shearwood, found floating in the water under the Gateshead Millennium Bridge when he was supposed to be on a golfing trip to Ireland. The man's wife Stella and brother Luke are baffled to discover he was working as an informant for HM Revenue and Customs. Chief Revenue investigator Owen Preece (guest star Robert Glenister) reveals John's business manager Mark Donovan has been running an alcohol scam through their haulage firm and the deceased had agreed to offer information in exchange for immunity from prosecution. Was his cover blown? Owen doesn't think so, and Mark has an alibi - unlike John's wife. Brenda Blethyn stars, with David Leon as her trusty sidekick Joe

programme.title: Wycliffe
programme.desc: The Cornish detective's silver wedding celebrations are interrupted by a fresh outbreak of crime on his patch. Five dead bodies have been found on board an abandoned lorry at the ferry terminal and a fugitive is on the run. Jack Shepherd, Helen Masters and Jimmy Yuill star

programme.title: Trigger Point
programme.desc: With the help of Lana, Counter Terrorism Command learn more about the recent murders. But their progress doesn't go unnoticed by the bomber, whose campaign only intensifies, putting more people in grave danger

Things take a shocking turn when the car finally turns up - with the body of a drug dealer in the boot. Detective drama, starring David Jason, with Melanie Thaw and Bruce Alexander

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: Sergeant Craddock investigates a suspicious road accident, and has to suffer the embarrassment of interrogating the High Sheriff about his involvement in the incident. Meanwhile, Gina has shattering news for Phil Bellamy, and Vernon opens a marriage bureau, which proves to have unforeseen consequences - for David at least. Rural drama, guest starring Angela Douglas (Carry On Cowboy)

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: Bellamy finds himself in over his head when he allows personal feelings to cloud his judgement in the case of a robbery suspect. Meanwhile, Vernon hopes great things will come of his newly installed party phone line. Rural drama, starring Mark Jordon and Geoffrey Hughes

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: Businessman and owner of the Causton Lions rugby team Mark Adler is mysteriously found dead in the club's cryotherapy chamber, which is normally used by the players for physiotherapy. Barnaby and Winter are called in to investigate and their list of suspects soon includes Adler's wife Samantha, former coach Guy Bevan, troubled star player Danny Wickham and physio Neville Gallagher. Neil Dudgeon stars, with Tamzin Outhwaite, Don Gilet and Michael Maloney

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: Victoria falls into the lake at Home Farm and makes a terrifying discovery, while Nicola encourages the villagers to stage a sit-in protest against the closure of the church.

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Gail Platt's dream kitchen starts taking shape as Joe McIntyre and David Platt work on rebuilding it. Meanwhile, Hayley Cropper returns to the street following an interview.

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Steve convinces Becky that he loves her by promising to leave Michelle. Meanwhile, Carla pays a visit to Rosie, and a nervous Maria attends her baby's ultrasound scan.

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: An investigation into the appearance of forged bank notes in Aidensfield leads to the discovery of a major crime operation, and Blaketon is persuaded to try a new image by Vernon _ with unfortunate repercussions. Meanwhile, Mike's suggestion that he and Jackie start a family is not met with the expected response. Rural police drama, starring Geoffrey Hughes and Derek Fowlds

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: The constabulary receives help from the Met to target a local drug trafficker, believed to be the boyfriend of Lord Ashfordly's sister Patricia. Meanwhile, a domestic drama involving Jackie's friend and her baby leaves Mike torn between the loyalties of work and home, and Vernon plans to take advantage of a postal strike. Rural police drama, starring Fiona Dolman and Jason Durr

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: When the body of a young man is found in a Second World War-era motor car full of exhaust fumes, it looks like an obvious case of suicide. But Simon Bright was not alone - and he was hit on the head before he died. Where is his girlfriend, newcomer Laura Sharp? And what is her hold on the people of Morton Fendle, a village still overshadowed by the gloomy spectre of the war? John Nettles and Jason Hughes star

programme.title: Grantchester
programme.desc: Detective drama set in a 1950s Cambridgeshire village, where local vicar Sidney Chambers develops a sideline in sleuthing - with the initially reluctant help of grumpy DI Geordie Keating. The cleric's first case finds him presiding over the funeral of a solicitor, who is believed to have taken his own life. However, the dead man's mistress has a different theory - and feeling unable to go to the police, she asks Sidney to examine it for her. He uncovers evidence that the suicide was staged, but while he's busy delving into the personal life of the victim, will the vicar miss his own big chance with Amanda Kendall, the woman he secretly loves? With James Norton, Robson Green, Tessa Peake-Jones, Kacey Ainsworth and Rachel Shelley

programme.title: Grantchester
programme.desc: Poor Sidney. His sister Jen bullies him into attending Amanda's engagement dinner - seeing the love of his life celebrate her betrothal to another man is the last thing the village vicar wants. He sinks a few too many drinks in a bid to make the evening more palatable, but it doesn't work - in fact, nobody at the event seems happy. Tensions rise between Amanda and Jen's old school friends, and then matters erupt when Jen's boyfriend Johnny (Ukweli Roach, Starlings) is accused of stealing Amanda's engagement ring. Later, the unfortunate chap is accused of murdering one of his fellow guests, and evidence at the scene of the crime seems to back up the theory. But Sidney isn't convinced - can he unmask the real killer?

programme.title: Trial & Retribution
programme.desc: Back on the murder squad, Pat is asked to investigate when a young mother of two, Diane Leach, is abducted from a local wood. The confession of a local sex offender complicates matters, as Pat looks into the possibility that the father of a young protege of the woman may be responsible for her disappearance. Meanwhile, Walker has worries of his own, as his ex-wife Lyn is dating an abusive, unstable man, who turns into a manic-obsessive when she decides to leave him

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: When Barnaby is dragged along to the wedding of the son of Sarah's friend Hazel, the last thing he expects to find himself doing is investigating a murder. But when his wife discovers the body of the bride, Laurel, who has been squeezed to death by her own wedding dress corset, the detective must look more closely at his fellow guests. The victim's husband Gavin is convinced that his wife's death had everything to do with her outspoken nature on her radio show, so Winter's attention soon turns to her unique community of nocturnal listeners. Gavin's scorned ex-fiancee and local wedding dress designer Serena also comes under suspicion, and Barnaby and Winter's enquiries lead them to a local wedding fayre. Neil Dudgeon stars, with Kelly Brook, Nick Hancock and Liz Fraser

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: Diane reveals Victoria has been screaming in her sleep and worries about the girl's mental health. Rodney becomes distracted when he oversees the shooting event at Home Farm.

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Steve uses Tony and Carla's wedding as an excuse to antagonise Michelle, hoping to goad her into leaving him, while Sally loses her temper and tells Maria about Liam's infidelity.

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: Jackie is assigned to act for a businessman accused of raping a fellow hotel guest during a conference, but she is not sure whether to believe he is innocent or not. Meanwhile, Vernon and David are dismayed to find their finances have hit rock-bottom and find themselves forced to seek employment to pay their electricity bill. Rural drama, starring Fiona Dolman, David Lonsdale and Geoffrey Hughes

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: The constabulary are on guard as the village is plagued by a series of mysterious explosions, while a redundant church provides Vernon and David with their next fortune-hunting endeavour. Nostalgic drama, starring Geoffrey Hughes and David Lonsdale

programme.title: Vera
programme.desc: Crime drama starring Brenda Blethyn. The detective investigates a fire that rips through a holiday park on the Northumberland coast, destroying three cabins. A young woman's body is discovered and the resort's owner, Jim Viner, fears the victim is his sister Deena when he returns from a weekend away with his daughter Clare. With Jim's suspicions confirmed, a police report then reveals Clare's boyfriend Ryan and his friends had been partying near the scene hours before the blaze started, but where are they now, and where is Deena's best friend Sally? Co-starring Kenny Doughty, Cush Jumbo and Jon Morrison

programme.title: Grantchester
programme.desc: A heartbroken Sidney agrees to help parishioner Isabel prepare for her wedding to Arthur, the new man in town, but the bride's stubborn mother, Daisy, proves to be a big impediment to the occasion as she believes the groom is out to kill her. When Daisy is then found dead, Mrs Maguire calls in Geordie to investigate, and Sidney finds himself dragged into the case - despite vowing to leave police business behind. While the victim seems to have died of natural causes, Arthur and Isabel are pushing for a fast cremation, suggesting the couple have something to hide. Jean Marsh and Isla Blair guest star

programme.title: Grantchester
programme.desc: Sidney is woken in the early hours by a fire in the village and, putting his life on the line, races to rescue Marion Taylor from the burning house, much to the relief of her husband Dominic. But there are questions surrounding the blaze - was it really an accident, and why was Marion so reluctant to leave? Normally Sidney would turn to Geordie to help solve a mystery like this, but he finds the detective is far from his usual self. When Dominic is then found stabbed to death, it's Geordie's junior, Atkins, who is sent to head up the case - and he's not exactly a fan of interfering vicars

programme.title: Trial & Retribution
programme.desc: In a grim turn of events, the tooth of the abducted woman is found in the debris from a wood chipper, while Walker's ex-wife's boyfriend turns psychotic

programme.title: George and Mildred
programme.desc: The Ropers' bed collapses and George finds himself short of cash to acquire a new one. Comedy, starring Brian Murphy and Yootha Joyce

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Buying goods from the comfort of home

programme.title: George and Mildred
programme.desc: Henpecked George finally finds a job, but the line of work could make him unpopular with road users. Comedy, starring Brian Murphy and Yootha Joyce

programme.title: George and Mildred
programme.desc: Mildred faces the prospect of becoming a step-grandmother when George's past catches up with him. Comedy, starring Brian Murphy and Yootha Joyce

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: Diane reveals Victoria has been screaming in her sleep and worries about the girl's mental health. Rodney becomes distracted when he oversees the shooting event at Home Farm.

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: Victoria tells a psychologist she made up her claims about the body in a bid for attention. Brenda is unhappy when Gennie announces her intention to go on an 18-30 holiday.

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Tony's wedding preparations are complicated by the arrival of his brother and Jed Stone's demand for compensation. Michelle puts a damper on Steve's plan to spend time with Becky.

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Steve uses Tony and Carla's wedding as an excuse to antagonise Michelle, hoping to goad her into leaving him, while Sally loses her temper and tells Maria about Liam's infidelity.

programme.title: A Touch of Frost
programme.desc: The investigation of a burglary at a quarry turns into something far more serious when a security guard's badly beaten body is discovered at the scene of the crime. An autistic teenager is arrested for the murder, despite Inspector Frost's misgivings - a move which triggers a chain of tragic events culminating in a tense stand-off. Feature-length episode of the crime drama, starring David Jason, Bruce Alexander, Caroline Harker and Maurice Roeves

programme.title: Heartbeat

Meanwhile, Vernon and David are dismayed to find their finances have hit rock-bottom and find themselves forced to seek employment to pay their electricity bill. Rural drama, starring Fiona Dolman, David Lonsdale and Geoffrey Hughes

programme.desc: The constabulary are on guard as the village is plagued by a series of mysterious explosions, while a redundant church provides Vernon and David with their next fortune-hunting endeavour. Nostalgic drama, starring Geoffrey Hughes and David Lonsdale

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: Things take a gruesome turn when Ferabbees Circus comes to town, bringing with it a chain of sinister clown sightings, threatening notes and deathly dangerous circus acts. Barnaby has to face up to his fears in order to solve the case. Drama, starring Neil Dudgeon, Nick Hendrix, Lorraine Ashbourne and Annette Badland

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: When Jasmine asks Eli to help move Shane's body, he reassures her it is safest to leave it where it is - but Daz accompanies Victoria to the lake, where they find the corpse.

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Maria tackles Rosie about Liam's affair, and Tina worries about all the money Joe is splashing out on Gail's kitchen, while Peter tries to ensure Simon is ready for school on time.

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Maria realises Tony knew about Liam's kiss with Carla before asking him to be best man, and Molly wonders why Tyrone is spending so much time with Minnie.

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: A Russian chess champion arrives to compete in an exhibition match, causing a crisis for the constabulary, who also find themselves on the trail of an exceptionally devious burglar. Meanwhile, David and Vernon face problems a little closer to home. Rural police drama, starring David Lonsdale and Geoffrey Hughes

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: An investigation into a cattle auctioneer puts Mike's career in danger when he finds himself under suspicion of taking bribes. The case also puts his relationship with his wife in jeopardy, culminating in a final, shocking revelation from Jackie. Meanwhile, Vernon attempts to bottle the secret of eternal youth

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: A mischievous trickster finally gets his comeuppance when his body is found floating below the weir in Midsomer Deverell. The extent of his double life starts to emerge when three family friends and a long-lost niece produce wills claiming his fortune, and his collection of erotic photographs from the 1960s gives Barnaby and Jones the key to the tangled relationships and feuds blighting the family

programme.title: Grantchester
programme.desc: Sidney takes Geordie to Johnny Johnson's London jazz club, hoping to leave their worries in Grantchester for the night, but the backstage murder of Johnny's sister Claudette puts paid to that. When Archie, the victim's father and owner of the club, calls in a police officer pal to crack the case, Geordie immediately detects the copper is corrupt, while Sidney makes an important discovery about Claudette that she had kept hidden from all but those closest to her. As every lead seems to come back to Archie's violent past, recriminations within the family begin to play out

programme.title: Grantchester
programme.desc: With Amanda and Guy's wedding fast approaching, and his betrayal of Hildegard still fresh in his mind, Sidney is thrown deep into crisis, and the murder of a local cop doesn't help matters as he allows himself to become drawn into another case with Geordie. However, tragedy strikes as the duo close in on the killer, and with Geordie's life hanging in the balance, the clergyman finds himself cut out of the investigation as the police close ranks. But that doesn't stop him enlisting the help of Mrs Maguire and Leonard in a daring mission to gather information on the man who shot his partner

programme.title: Trial & Retribution
programme.desc: First of two-part crime drama from the prolific pen of Lynda La Plante. DCI Roisin Connor is called in to investigate the gruesome discovery of a woman's severed hand in the River Thames, and soon finds herself pitted against rival officer Chief Superintendent Mike Walker as they are drawn into a deadly game with a psychotic killer. Victoria Smurfit and David Hayman star

programme.title: George and Mildred
programme.desc: An old flame of Mildred's turns up at the Roper house, prompting George to blow the cobwebs off his little black book. Comedy, starring Brian Murphy and Yootha Joyce

programme.title: Unwind with ITV
programme.desc: Daily escape designed to calm the mind and encourage relaxation and reflection

programme.desc: Buying goods from the comfort of home

programme.title: George and Mildred
programme.desc: Mrs Roper wants to install a shower, but a lack of cash forces a compromise on costs - and workmanship. Brian Murphy and Yootha Joyce star

programme.title: George and Mildred
programme.desc: After resigning from his job as a traffic warden, henpecked George wonders how he can break the news to wife Mildred without incurring her wrath. Brian Murphy and Yootha Joyce star

programme.title: A Touch of Frost
programme.desc: Jack learns he is tipped for promotion with the uniform branch and even more flattered to discover he has a secret admirer, but before he has time to bask in this rare moment of glory a child murder claims his attention. Linking the disappearance of a 10-year-old boy to a mysterious hit-and-run killing, he is soon mired in a complex investigation and fuming about a bureaucratic blunder that leaves a known paedophile walking free on his patch. David Jason stars

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: A touring dance extravaganza comes to Midsomer, but nobody sees the vicious rivalries and long-running feuds that are brewing behind the scenes - at least not until they erupt into murder. Barnaby's investigation into the killing of a dancer is complicated by an unexpected visit from his father, while the sponsor of the event is at the centre of a conflict of his own as he tries to decide who should inherit his fortune. Guest starring Nigel Havers and Christopher Timothy, as well as former Strictly Come Dancing stars Cassidy Little, Faye Tozer, Danny Mac, Natalie Gumede and Tom Chambers

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: The police discover how Shane died, and Marlon presents his wife with an eternity ring on her birthday. Val decides to hold a toga party at the Woolpack to see in the New Year.

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: Donna worries Ross may be a suspect for Shane's murder, and a stunned Marlon finds out about the couple's affair. Val feels uncomfortable about Daz and Victoria's closeness.

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Maria asks Tom to help her get the truth about Liam's death. Janice starts her community service. The Platts are horrified to learn the identity of their new neighbours.

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Maria questions Dev about the night of Liam's death, and Gail attempts to make peace with the Platts' new neighbours, while Tyrone takes steps to allay Molly's suspicions.

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: Part one of two. Mike faces a stressful time as he struggles to cope with his wife's departure, and Tricia offers him a shoulder to cry on, but is beset by problems of her own after prescribing birth control to a 16-year-old. Meanwhile, Sergeant Craddock finds his efforts to prepare for an important visit hampered by a series of attacks on the station, and Vernon makes a startling discovery in his bathtub. Jason Durr and Clare Calbraith star

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: Part two of two. Carl Lomax's case comes to court, and a local reporter soon rakes up the dirt over Tricia's controversial decision to supply his girlfriend with birth-control drugs. Before long, he escapes from custody and goes on the run with Deborah. Meanwhile, Vernon invests in a new money-making scheme

programme.title: Vera
programme.desc: When the remains of a teenager are found half-buried in a wood, Vera finds herself investigating a 30-year-old mystery. Identified as Carrie Telling, a girl who disappeared during the 1984 miners' strike, the team retrieves news footage from the protests that shows her taking pictures in the background. It appears she got caught up in the unrest that day, contradicting her father's assertion that she went straight home. Photographs recovered from her camera yield further revelations for Vera. What did Carrie discover that ultimately led to her death?

programme.title: Grantchester
programme.desc: Detective drama set in the 1950s about a vicar and a police inspector solving crimes in rural Cambridgeshire. DC Phil Wilkinson arrests Sidney on a charge of sexual assault made by Harding Redmond after reading entries in the diary of his teenage daughter Abigail, who has now gone missing, along with the journal itself. After being grilled by DCI Benson, Sidney sets out to prove his innocence and is joined in his investigation by Geordie. James Norton and Robson Green star

programme.title: Grantchester
programme.desc: Geordie calls on Sidney for help as he investigates the apparent suicide of a Cambridge lecturer, who was found dead after falling from the spire of King's College Chapel. His wife and his star pupil, who used to partake in daredevil climbs of the college buildings alongside his mentor, are convinced he was too happy and content for it to be suicide. It appears to be a case of night climbing misadventure, until a student witness comes forward, leading Sidney and Geordie into a world of espionage and secrets. Detective drama, starring James Norton, Robson Green and Morven Christie

programme.title: Trial & Retribution
programme.desc: Conclusion of the two-part crime drama. Connor and Walker fear for the children's safety as their suspicions about Harwood are confirmed, and when they finally catch up with him it seems he has lost his mind. David Hayman, Victoria Smurfit and Charles Dance star

programme.title: George and Mildred
programme.desc: Poor Mildred's hopes are raised when work-shy George looks for a job, but his chances of finding gainful employment seem slim. Comedy, starring Brian Murphy and Yootha Joyce

programme.title: George and Mildred
programme.desc: The Ropers babysit for their neighbours, but George misses his usual routine - so he nips out to a darts match with the infant in tow. Comedy, starring Brian Murphy

programme.title: George and Mildred
programme.desc: Eagle-eyed George sees an investment opportunity when Mildred suggests their dog should have puppies. Comedy, starring Brian Murphy and Yootha Joyce

programme.title: A Touch of Frost
programme.desc: Jack returns to duty after a period of suspension, and finds himself investigating the murder of a man who had been leading a double life. In addition, he also has to deal with the baffling case of a man found dead with his right foot hacked off and replaced by a severed left foot. Drama, starring David Jason and Amanda Root

programme.desc: Part two of two. Carl Lomax's case comes to court, and a local reporter soon rakes up the dirt over Tricia's controversial decision to supply his girlfriend with birth-control drugs. Before long, he escapes from custody and goes on the run with Deborah. Meanwhile, Vernon invests in a new money-making scheme

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: The Midsomer Museum of the Family is packed with visitors to see a collection of miniature doll's houses donated by a real estate mogul - only for the businessman to be shot dead in front of the crowd. Barnaby's investigation uncovers evidence of unsafe living conditions for the victim's tenants that would have given plenty of people a reason to kill - as well as a mysterious death that a man was imprisoned for, despite protesting his innocence.

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: Marlon tells the police that Shane was blackmailing Ross about his affair with Donna, while Val warns Daz that she is keeping a close eye on his friendship with Victoria.

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: Ross returns to the village and attacks Marlon when he realises he implicated him in Shane's murder. Jimmy struggles to cope with the pressure of organising Matthew's funeral.

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Maria quizzes customers at the salon to see whether they think Tony is capable of murder, and Norris struggles to get rid of Jed, while Molly grows suspicious of Tyrone.

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Tyrone tells Molly the truth. Audrey decides Maria needs medical help, and Eileen eagerly awaits the arrival of her dad. Meanwhile, Michelle makes Becky feel guilty.

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: Aidensfield residents are shocked when an MI5 agent turns up in the village showing more than just a passing interest in the activities of Vernon Scripps and his mysterious associate, a man who disembarked from a Russian trawler docked in Whitby harbour. It seems there is an even darker side to the roguish wheeler-dealer than they suspected

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: Lord Ashfordly's staff come under suspicion when some African carvings are stolen from the hall - but then an African chieftain arrives claiming the very same pieces belong to his tribe. Vernon sees a business opportunity that needs the royal stamp of approval and probationary PC Tom Nicholson turns up at the station. Nostalgic drama, starring Jason Durr, Rupert Vansittart and Geoffrey Hughes

programme.title: Doc Martin
programme.desc: Louisa and Martin search for a nursery now that Janice has left, and Mrs Tishell is shocked to find out that Al has very high blood pressure. Louisa also helps with the diagnosis of a pupil, which spurs her on to explore the possibilities of a change of career. This is not welcome news for Martin, who dislikes any kind of change, even if it could be for the better. Elsewhere, Ruth is approached about selling her farm. Starring Martin Clunes, Caroline Catz, Selina Cadell and Ian McNeice

programme.title: Doc Martin
programme.desc: The curmudgeonly GP is perturbed when he discovers Louisa, who is already spending much of her time away from home, has applied to take up a child and adolescent counselling course. However, achieving a work-life balance is far from the greatest of concerns for some of the Ellinghams' neighbours, not least of whom is Al, whose plans to demonstrate his business acumen are placed in jeopardy when Ken decides to close the pub. Unless Ruth agrees to serve as a guarantor, Ken will not allow Morwenna and Al to take over the establishment, so the pair arrange a race-walking event to raise funds and prove the community is on their side

programme.title: Grantchester
programme.desc: A young man sat alone in the church and covered in blood confesses to Sidney and Geordie that he attacked and killed his landlord. However, when the pair investigate further, they find the alleged victim alive and well with his family. Elsewhere, Margaret's visits to the vicarage begin to leave Mrs Maguire irritated, Leonard is distracted by secretive trips to the cinema, and Geordie is compelled to deal with a surprising shoplifter. Drama set in the 1950s, starring James Norton and Robson Green

programme.title: Grantchester
programme.desc: As the trial of local teenager Gary Bell approaches, Sidney and Geordie find themselves in disagreement regarding his guilt. Meanwhile, a man is convinced that his dead wife is haunting his home and stable yards, and implores Sidney to come to his estate and perform an exorcism for him. The vicar offers prayers and counsel, but when the man is found hanged in the exact same spot in which his wife died, Sidney and Geordie are united by a shared goal as they investigate his suicide. Drama set in the 1950s, starring James Norton and Robson Green

programme.title: Trial & Retribution
programme.desc: First of a two-part story by Lynda La Plante in which the team investigate the death of a prostitute who plunged from the balcony of a block of luxury apartments. They discover she was the daughter of a famous Seventies TV star murdered 12 years previously, whose killer was never traced, and try to find a link between the two crimes. David Hayman stars as the newly promoted DCS Michael Walker, alongside Victoria Smurfit, Colin Salmon and Frances Barber

programme.title: Wycliffe
programme.desc: Unexplained killings rock the Bodmin community, giving rise to fears that the so-called 'beast', a monster enshrined in local legend, has returned to wreak fresh havoc. Kersey ventures up onto the moors to investigate and does not return - so Wycliffe is forced to go it alone. Jack Shepherd and Jimmy Yuill star

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Buying goods from the comfort of home

programme.title: George and Mildred
programme.desc: An old flame of Mildred's turns up at the Roper house, prompting George to blow the cobwebs off his little black book. Comedy, starring Brian Murphy and Yootha Joyce

programme.title: Wycliffe
programme.desc: When a woman is found strangled, a pathologist detects chilling similarities with a number of unsolved murders - prompting Wycliffe and his team to reopen 11-year-old case files. Detective drama, starring Jack Shepherd, Tim Wylton and Helen Masters

programme.title: Wycliffe
programme.desc: The detective and his team investigate a series of bizarre events in the aftermath of a wedding which boasted a most unusual guest list. It transpires the couple had only met three weeks before the ceremony, and the honeymoon in a luxury hotel ends in a brutal killing. Drama, starring Jack Shepherd, with Ronald Hines and Josephine Butler

programme.title: Wycliffe
programme.desc: Charles investigates the fatal stabbing of a businessman in a pub car park - and gradually discovers the victim was not the upstanding pillar of the community he appeared to be. Jack Shepherd and Sharon Duce star

programme.title: Endeavour
programme.desc: As campaigning for the 1970 general election gets under way in Oxford, racial tensions escalate in the city and a clash between two rival gangs leads Morse and Thursday to the door of a familiar face, where they discover the influence of a right wing organisation hoping to win an Oxford seat. Things get worse at an Indian restaurant, where a mysterious disappearance and a shocking murder put even the strongest family loyalties to the test. Crime drama, starring Shaun Evans and Roger Allam

programme.title: The Darling Buds of May
programme.desc: Part one of two. Pop busies himself organising a christening while awaiting the birth of his first grandchild - and still finds time to cast a beady eye over the contents of an elderly widow's home. Whimsical rural drama, starring David Jason, Pam Ferris, Philip Franks and Catherine Zeta-Jones

programme.title: The Darling Buds of May
programme.desc: Part two of two. Preparations get under way for the christening, while Primrose loses her heart to a very confused vicar. Pop gets a black eye, Edith Pilchester tackles a gang of roving Teddy boys and Mademoiselle Dupont begins to feel ill. Drama, starring David Jason, Pam Ferris and Catherine Zeta-Jones

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: When a family glassware business collapses following the death of one of its partners, Barnaby investigates allegations of financial irregularities, love triangles and a string of murders. Lapsed Freemason Jones uses his inside knowledge to explore the ceremonial aspects of two killings, but it is Cully's production of Hamlet that gives Tom the key to the mystery. John Nettles, Jason Hughes, Jane Wymark and Laura Howard star

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: Barnaby is delighted that his heroes Hired Gun are reuniting to play at the Midsomer Rocks festival - minus their drummer, who disappeared 30 years ago after driving his car into a quarry. However, a string of bizarre warnings convinces the paranoid lead singer that someone is trying to stop the reunion, and his fears are confirmed when the backing singer drops dead on stage. Radio 2 host Suzi Quatro guest stars

programme.title: Motorsport Mundial
programme.desc: The latest action from the world of motorsport, featuring race coverage, insights, and behind-the-scenes footage from the planet's biggest and best motorsport series

programme.title: Auto Mundial
programme.desc: The latest news and reviews from the world of motorsport

programme.title: The Big Match Revisited
programme.desc: Brian Moore presents action from December 1979, featuring Crystal Palace v Nottingham Forest, Middlesbrough v Southampton and Ipswich Town v Manchester City

programme.title: The Big Match Revisited
programme.desc: Brian Moore presents action from December 1979, including Chelsea v Swansea City, Newcastle United v Queens Park Rangers and Liverpool v Crystal Palace

programme.title: Ninja Warrior UK
programme.desc: Ben Shephard, Rochelle Humes and Chris Kamara host the grand final of the obstacle course challenge, with the final five competitors from across the nation testing their strength, speed and courage. Those who make it to the end of the adrenaline-fuelled mission face one final task - scaling the heights of a tower named Mount Midoriyama - as they battle it out for the title of Ninja Warrior UK

programme.title: Cadfael
programme.desc: The monks cause a storm of resentment by launching an expedition to a Welsh village to recover the bones of St Winifred and return them to the abbey. As if that does not make them unpopular enough, a local landowner dies in mysterious circumstances and it is up to Brother Cadfael to clear his colleagues of murder and ensure they get out of the country alive. Medieval mystery, starring Derek Jacobi, Michael Culver, John Hallam and Anna Friel

programme.title: The Return of Sherlock Holmes
programme.desc: Suffering from nervous exhaustion, Holmes sets off for a break on the wild Cornish peninsula, where he hopes the peace and quiet will help him convalesce. Unfortunately, several murders ensure his holiday is far from relaxing. Period detective drama, guest starring Denis Quilley

programme.title: The Return of Sherlock Holmes
programme.desc: The mystery surrounding a legendary racehorse's disappearance is solved with the help of one of the most famous clues in the Holmes canon - 'the curious incident of the dog in the night-time'. Victorian detective drama, starring Jeremy Brett and Edward Hardwicke

programme.title: The Return of Sherlock Holmes
programme.desc: A houseguest wakes up in dilapidated Wisteria Lodge to find that his host and all the household servants have vanished. Understandably perplexed, he heads straight for Baker Street and asks Holmes to solve the mystery of their disappearance. Jeremy Brett and Edward Hardwicke star

programme.title: Ice Road Truckers: Deadliest Roads
programme.desc: Lisa Kelly and Rick Yemm drive higher into the Himalayas than ever before, transporting fragile statues of a Hindu goddess. But they soon encounter problems when rockslides threaten to hit them on the tight roads - putting the sacred sculptures at risk of breaking and making the whole trip worthless. Meanwhile, Dave Redmon tackles the notorious Ledge, with an oversized load and the oncoming traffic showing no signs of slowing

programme.title: Ice Road Truckers
programme.desc: Alex Debogorski is hauling groceries to an isolated community in Canada when he hits a stretch of road flooded after a river burst its banks and there is no telling exactly how deep the water is, nor whether his rig can make it across. In Prudhoe Bay, Alaska, Tony Molesky is not convinced that Dave Redmon's driving skills are good enough to go solo after he completes his debut training run. In Fairbanks, Maya Sieber gets her first taste of the dangers of the haul road, while Lisa Kelly helps out a fellow driver whose truck has spun into a ditch

programme.title: The Motorbike Show
programme.desc: Henry Cole joins the Scooter Boys and uncovers the relationship they have with bikers. He also gets a glimpse of the custom motorcycles of the future in London's East End. The restoration of his Bonneville is down to a paint job as it gets a stunning new look, and Pete reveals a talent for track racing

programme.title: The Debrief with Dan and ROG
programme.desc: Dan Biggar and Ronan O'Gara were never short of a word or two on the pitch as players, and now they team up to talk rugby in 'The Debrief', as they analyse the best of the action from round three of the Nations Championship alongside Claire Thomas.

programme.title: Sharpe
programme.desc: Maverick British rifleman Richard Sharpe is promoted for saving General Wellesley's life, and sent behind enemy lines to rally Spanish support. Surrounded by the French, he manages to pull off an inspiring propaganda coup in the small town of Torrecastro. Swashbuckling adventure, featuring Downton Abbey creator Julian Fellowes and starring Sean Bean and Brian Cox

programme.title: Sharpe
programme.desc: The return of an old enemy leads to a series of problems, beginning with the loss of Sharpe's hard-earned captaincy, and culminating in a race against time to rescue his lover Teresa and their baby from the beleaguered city of Badajoz before Wellesley's forces attack. Military adventure, starring Sean Bean and Pete Postlethwaite

programme.title: The Summit Australia
programme.desc: Twelve hikers are left on the mountain, and with only 11 days left to get to the summit, the group are realising that getting to the top is about a whole lot more than physical endurance

programme.title: Minder
programme.desc: Arthur is asked for protection by newsagent Mr Mukerjee, who has been sent death threats and had a brick thrown through his window. programme.title: Magnum, PI

programme.title: Magnum, PI

programme.title: The Champions
programme.desc: Craig and Richard search for Sharron, who has disappeared while on holiday in Cornwall - and encounter spooky goings-on at an imposing manor. Fantasy drama, starring William Gaunt, Alexandra Bastedo and Stuart Damon

programme.title: Minder
programme.desc: Crafty entrepreneur Arthur attempts to sell off cheap reproduction pottery to a Brighton antiques dealer, but gets drawn into a shady horse-racing deal instead. George Cole and Dennis Waterman star

programme.title: River Monsters
programme.desc: Jeremy Wade visits southern Africa to see if he can track down a deadly fish that lurks in the eerie waters of the Okavango. A killer with shark-like teeth, there are stories of it hunting in packs and feeding on schooling fish or even human bodies. Jeremy is determined to find out if it is a giant piranha or something equally terrifying

programme.title: River Monsters
programme.desc: Jeremy Wade takes on Africa's wild Zambezi River to find an unknown predator dragging fishermen to their deaths. Crocodiles and hippos are guilty of killing dozens of victims in plain view, yet it is said there is another monstrous beast stalking these deep and turbulent waters. Locals speak of 'the Mazunda' - but what is this sinister, child-swallowing creature?

programme.title: The Motorbike Show
programme.desc: Henry Cole enters his first ever motorbike race and trains with British superbike racer Chris Walker. He then goes off-road riding with Dakar Rally competitor Lyndon Poskitt. Plus, an update on the 1970s Bonneville as Pete Thorne and Henry make their own wheels

programme.title: Top Gun
programme.desc: An arrogant pilot's maverick flying skills earn him a place in an elite US Navy school, where he comes into conflict with a fellow student and falls for his civilian instructor. A tragedy in the air threatens to end his military career - until an international incident offers him a chance to redeem himself. Aerial action adventure, starring Tom Cruise, Kelly McGillis, Val Kilmer, Anthony Edwards and Tom Skerritt

programme.desc: In the heart of Central America lurks a marine creature believed to reach 8ft in length and weigh up to 300lbs. programme.title: River Monsters
programme.desc: On the Canada-US border lies a vast lake that hides a dark history. For Native Americans it's an ancient and sacred site, but recently something has risen up from the depths to attack swimmers, and stories abound of an invasion of primordial bloodsuckers. Extreme angler Jeremy Wade plunges into the heart of a waterfall in the Pacific Northwest on a mission to catch the oldest river monster of his career

programme.title: Sharpe
programme.desc: Maverick British rifleman Richard Sharpe is promoted for saving General Wellesley's life, and sent behind enemy lines to rally Spanish support. Swashbuckling adventure, featuring Downton Abbey creator Julian Fellowes and starring Sean Bean and Brian Cox

programme.title: Magnum, PI
programme.desc: The rugged private investigator investigates a case involving his friend Carol as she prepares to testify against a man put behind bars by her father. US detective drama, starring Tom Selleck

programme.desc: Maverick British rifleman Richard Sharpe is promoted for saving General Wellesley's life, and sent behind enemy lines to rally Spanish support. Surrounded by the French, he manages to pull off an inspiring propaganda coup in the small town of Torrecastro. Swashbuckling adventure, featuring Downton Abbey creator Julian Fellowes and starring Sean Bean and Brian Cox
